title: typo markdown/podman-pull.1.md
body:
https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/docs/source/markdown/podman-pull.1.md says:
```
OPTIONS
--all-tags, a

All tagged images in the repository will be pulled.
```
`a` should be prefixed by a hyphen.

comments.body: Actually the `, a` should be removed --all-tags and -a are NOT aliases for the same option.
